title: Kubernetes
description: RJSF form schema for creating a Kubernetes credential. Captures the user-input fields of the canonical Credential construct; the `secret` object is the kubernetes-specific shape persisted under the canonical free-form `secret` map. Field shape, types, enums, and required list MUST stay a subset of meshery/schemas/constructs/v1beta1/credential/api.yml#/components/schemas/Credential; the Go validator at validation/forms_test.go enforces that.

secret.title: Credential Secret
secret.description: Credential secret for the Kubernetes cluster

clusterUserName.title: User Name
clusterUserName.description: Name of the Kubernetes cluster user

clusterToken.title: Token
clusterToken.description: Token of the Kubernetes cluster user

clusterClientCertificateData.title: Client Certificate Data
clusterClientCertificateData.description: Certificate data of the Kubernetes cluster

clusterClientKeyData.title: Client Key Data
clusterClientKeyData.description: Client Key data of the Kubernetes cluster

clusterCertificateAuthorityData.title: Certificate Authority Data
clusterCertificateAuthorityData.description: Certificate Authority data of the Kubernetes cluster
